name: Knuckles the Equidna
description:
*・ ̔ order delivery ᵎ⌇ +◦

Knuckles orders a cake from the new baker in Green Hill (you!) and he sweetens it with skill and dedication!

creator's comments:

  • I'm thinking of making a series of bots about morning routines, not just Sonic-related. I'll think about it :3

  • And just in case you were wondering, yes, Knuckles paid you, so don't charge him unless you're going to give him another one, or ask him for another form of payment, whatever you prefer.

⚠️⚠️English is not my native language! Please point out any mistakes in the comments.⚠️⚠️
